ocr_findings.description: Lesson 15-01 title banner illustration (computer attacked by virus-like creatures) captured as image placeholder; no text content lost
コンピュータの病原体 callout box with illustration captured as image placeholder; sidebar text 'コンピュータの病原体 / 私たちが細菌やウイルス…' correctly reproduced in OCR body

reviewer_notes: Page 492 of the source. Lesson 15-01 情報セキュリティの脅威 chapter opening. All body paragraphs reproduced accurately including definitions of サイバー攻撃 and 情報セキュリティ, and the three-category list (人的/技術的/物理的脅威). No substantive text loss.
